title: draba yungayensis
intro: Draba yungayensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Andean region of Peru, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba yungayensis include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Draba yungayensis include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
